content.problemStatement:
Recently, Greg got a grid with nnn rows and mmm columns. Rows are indexed from 111 to nnn and columns are indexed from 111 to mmm. The cell (i,j) ( i , j )(i,j) is the cell of intersection of row iii and column jjj. Each cell has a number written on it. The number written on cell  (i,j)( i , j )(i,j)  is equal to  (i+j)(i+j)(i+j).

Now, Greg wants to select some cells from the grid, such that for every pair of  selected cells ,the numbers on the cells are co-prime.  Determine the maximum number of cells that Greg can select.


Input Format

A single line containing the integers nnn and mmm denoting number of rows and number of columns respectively.


Output Format

Output a single line containing the answer.
